metadata.description: Fintech / payments investors. Thesis notes populated from primary sources (recon 2026-07-07) so fund-criteria can tag them.
metadata.default_keywords: fintech, payments, embedded finance, financial infrastructure

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Early-stage disruptive financial services in the US, UK and Latin America.
watchlist.notes: Operator-led fintech specialist founded by Capital One co-founders (Nigel Morris). Early-stage, ~$5M initial checks out of a $1.05B fund. Ports Capital One's fanatical focus on unit economics and hypothesis-driven experimentation. Will company-build from day zero. Comfort operating in regulated financial services. Portfolio: Nubank, Credit Karma, SoFi, Klarna, Avant.

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Financial infrastructure and embedded finance platforms.
watchlist.notes: Thesis: every company will be a fintech company; embedded finance meets customers where they already are, at 5-10x conversion vs traditional acquisition. Infrastructure-focused, typically later stage. Comfort with regulated financial services and licensing.

Pre-seed and seed fintech specialist ($300M across three funds). Thesis: everything is fintech, vertical SaaS increasingly earns its revenue from payments and financial services. At pre-seed the founder is the most critical factor.

watchlist.thesis_alignment: AI-native financial infrastructure and embedded finance, early stage.
watchlist.notes: Author of the Fintech Blueprint. Thesis centers on AI-native financial infrastructure and embedded finance at the early stage.
Generalist fund by Packy McCormick (Not Boring). Backs ambitious founders across fintech, crypto and infrastructure; narrative-driven investing.
Benchmark GP. Marketplaces and consumer thesis built on network effects (the hierarchy of marketplaces). Early stage, not fintech-exclusive.

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Fintech analyst and commentator, not a primary check-writer.
watchlist.notes: Fintech analyst and commentator (Fintech Snark Tank / Cornerstone Advisors). A market voice rather than a fund; tracked for intelligence, not deal flow.

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Research-led investing across tech and fintech.
watchlist.notes: The Generalist. Deep research-led investing across tech and fintech.

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Angel, network effects and platform strategy.
watchlist.notes: Angel investor known for network-effects and platform-strategy essays.
